## Summary

- What changed?

## Why This Change

- Why is this change needed?
- What problem does it solve?

## How To Test

- What did you run or verify?
- How should a reviewer validate this PR?

## Documentation Updates

- Did any README, onboarding, usage, or contributor docs change?
- If yes, were the related English and Chinese public-facing docs updated or intentionally deferred?

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused and does not mix unrelated changes
- [ ] I described what changed and why
- [ ] I documented the validation or testing I performed
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, setup, or contributor workflow changed
- [ ] I considered whether related public-facing bilingual docs also need updates
